# macos-screen-recorder (sck-record)

> macos-screen-recorder (sck-record) is a macOS screen recorder that captures the screen with system audio via ScreenCaptureKit — CLI, no loopback driver, no sudo — plus a Claude Code skill.

## Install (Claude Code)
- Add the marketplace: `/plugin marketplace add connerkward/ckw-skills`
- Install this plugin: `/plugin install macos-screen-recorder@connerkward`

## Links
- Canonical README: https://github.com/connerkward/macos-screen-recorder-system-audio
- Marketplace (all of Conner K. Ward's skills + MCP servers): https://github.com/connerkward/ckw-skills

## Optional
- Author: Conner K. Ward — https://github.com/connerkward
